---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see -->

## 💡 Problem/Motivation
<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed? -->

## 🎯 Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe how you envision this feature working -->

## 🎨 Design/Mockups
<!-- If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or design concepts -->

## 📋 User Stories
<!-- Describe how users would interact with this feature -->
As a **[user type]**, I want to **[action]** so that **[benefit]**.

Example:
As a **website visitor**, I want to **filter projects by technology** so that **I can quickly find relevant work**.

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
<!-- What conditions must be met for this feature to be considered complete? -->
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## 🔄 Alternative Solutions
<!-- Have you considered any alternative solutions or features? -->

## 📊 Impact
<!-- How would this feature benefit the project? -->
- [ ] Improves user experience
- [ ] Adds new functionality
- [ ] Enhances performance
- [ ] Increases accessibility
- [ ] Other: ___________

## 🎯 Priority
<!-- How important is this feature? -->
- [ ] Critical (must have)
- [ ] High (should have)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (future consideration)

## 🏗️ Implementation Complexity
<!-- Estimate the complexity of implementing this feature -->
- [ ] Low (few hours)
- [ ] Medium (few days)
- [ ] High (week+)
- [ ] Very High (multiple weeks)

## 📝 Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context, links, or references about the feature -->

## 🔗 Related Issues
<!-- Link to any related issues or PRs -->
- Related to #
- Depends on #
- Blocks #

## 🎨 Design System Considerations
<!-- How does this feature align with our design system? -->
- Uses brand colors: [ ] Yes [ ] No [ ] N/A
- Follows 2px border rule: [ ] Yes [ ] No [ ] N/A
- Works in dark mode: [ ] Yes [ ] No [ ] N/A
- Fully responsive: [ ] Yes [ ] No [ ] N/A
- Includes animations: [ ] Yes [ ] No [ ] N/A

## 🌍 Localization
<!-- Does this feature need to support multiple languages? -->
- [ ] Yes, translations needed
- [ ] No, language-agnostic
- [ ] Not sure

## ♿ Accessibility
<!-- Have you considered accessibility requirements? -->
- [ ] Keyboard navigation required
- [ ] Screen reader support needed
- [ ] ARIA labels needed
- [ ] Color contrast considerations
- [ ] Other: ___________
